nodes.label: SUMO Calibration Integrity Status
nodes.rationale: Details what data is real (turn-ratio counts for 6 of 12 intersections, OSM junction matches) vs estimated (remaining turn-ratios, saturation flows using HCM defaults, car-following parameters, passenger-only mix, single-hour demand profile, no ped/bike counts, routeSampler-inferred OD matrix).

nodes.label: Bellevue City Engagement Priorities
nodes.rationale: Critical long poles needed to remove scare quotes from 'calibrated SUMO': P0 (24h counts, timing plans), P1 (saturation flow surveys, heavy vehicle fractions), P2 (peak counts, ped/bike counts), P3 (OD from ITS).
